graded_findings.rationale: The gather evidence says this new implementation plan matches the diff's status command, registration, tests, and collector reporting behavior. There is no adherence gap to grade for this item.

The gather evidence says this new design spec describes the added no-argument status command, local discovery, table output, and collector reporting. That makes this item a non-issue rather than a merge concern.

A new user-facing dscli status command was added, but the existing dscli user guide and command reference still omit its usage and options. That is a substantive documentation gap for an exposed CLI feature.

The generated repo index is stale because it does not list the new cli/status.py entrypoint. This should be corrected for AI context accuracy, but it is secondary to the missing user-facing command documentation.
